# Risk Reversal Offer Engine

If skeptical buyers do not believe ads, lower the cost of being wrong.

| Type | Best use |
|---|---|
| No-credit-card trial | Low-friction SaaS. |
| Sandbox with sample data | Technical buyers. |
| Proof-before-payment | Automation/data products. |
| Free diagnostic | Complex B2B. |
| Pilot credited to annual | Enterprise buyers. |
| Setup guarantee | Products with onboarding friction. |
| Cancel anytime | Self-serve SaaS. |
| Data export guarantee | Lock-in concern. |
| Money-back guarantee | Clear outcome products. |

Only guarantee outcomes you can control.
